question: What does register return for input type="file"?

options.explanation: register returns a FileList even when only one file is selected
For security reasons the browser does not expose the file path
A FileList is returned, not a Blob

question: How do you validate the size of an uploaded file in Zod?

options.explanation: Zod has no built-in z.file() type — use z.instanceof(FileList) with refine
z.string().max() checks string length, not file size
No such method exists — use refine for custom validation

question: Which approach is used to create a preview of an uploaded image?

options.explanation: fs.readFile() is a Node.js API and is not available in the browser
File has no toDataURL method — use URL.createObjectURL() or FileReader

options.text: Uploading the file to the server and getting back a URL
options.explanation: This is unnecessary — a preview can be created on the client without a server
